title: lotus glareosus subsp. glacialis
intro: Lotus glareosus subsp. glacialis, also known as the Tibetan lotus or Himalayan lotus, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that grows in the Himalayan region and Tibetan Plateau. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus glareosus subsp. glacialis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and improve immune function.
